nasb.text: “Then I said concerning her who was worn out by adulteries, ‘Will they now commit adultery with her when she is thus?’

esv.text: “Then I said of her who was worn out by adultery, ‘Now they will continue to use her for a whore, even her!’

cnv.text: “我論到這個因行淫而衰頹的婦人說：現在讓人與她行淫吧，因為她本來就是妓女。

ccb.text: 我说，‘她们纵欲无度、年老色衰，这些人还与她们淫乱。
